events.title: Wim Hof Method Fundamentals Workshop
events.description: Join Terry for a comprehensive introduction to the Wim Hof Method. Learn the three pillars - breathing, cold exposure, and commitment - that will transform your relationship with your body and mind. This full-day workshop includes theory, extensive breathing sessions, and an ice bath experience.
events.shortDescription: A full-day immersive workshop covering breathing techniques and ice bath fundamentals.

events.title: Sunrise Breathwork & Ice Bath
events.description: Start your day with intention and vitality. This morning session combines energizing breathwork exercises with a refreshing ice bath plunge. Experience increased energy, mental clarity, and a powerful sense of accomplishment before most people have had their coffee.
events.shortDescription: Morning energizing session with breathwork and cold exposure.

events.title: Corporate Wellness Retreat
events.description: A specialized program designed for teams looking to build resilience, reduce stress, and improve performance. This half-day retreat includes team-building exercises, group breathwork sessions, and guided ice bath experiences. Perfect for companies prioritizing employee wellbeing.
events.shortDescription: Team-building wellness retreat for corporate groups.

events.title: Advanced Cold Exposure Training
events.description: For practitioners ready to take their cold exposure practice deeper. This advanced session covers extended breath holds, longer ice bath durations, and techniques for maintaining calm under extreme stress. Prerequisites: Completion of Fundamentals Workshop or equivalent experience.

events.title: Full Moon Breathwork Ceremony
events.description: A unique evening experience combining the power of the full moon with transformative breathwork. Release what no longer serves you and set intentions for the coming month. Includes guided meditation, circular breathing, and a gentle cold plunge under the moonlight.
events.shortDescription: Evening ceremony with meditation and breathwork under the full moon.
